title: Klaviyo vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and find the best fit for your business needs.
intro: Klaviyo and AWeber are two established email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. Klaviyo excels at e-commerce automation with advanced analytics, while AWeber prioritizes simplicity and affordability for bloggers and small creators. Choosing between them depends on your business type, budget, and feature requirements.

comparison_table.tool_a: Predictive analytics, SMS, e-commerce flows, reviews
comparison_table.tool_b: RSS-to-email, landing pages, AMP emails, affordability

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced automation
You want predictive analytics and SMS marketing capabilities built-in
You're willing to pay more for premium features and higher user satisfaction
choose_b_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur looking for simple, affordable email marketing
You need RSS-to-email automation to repurpose your content
You want to participate in an affiliate program (30% recurring commission)

faq.a: Klaviyo is better for e-commerce businesses needing advanced automation and analytics, with a higher G2 rating (4.6 vs 4.2). However, AWeber may be better for bloggers and solopreneurs who prioritize simplicity and cost-effectiveness. The best choice depends on your specific use case and budget.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Both offer free tiers with 500 subscriber limits, but AWeber maintains a more affordable pricing structure across all subscription levels.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and import them into the other service. Most email marketing tools support standard CSV or API imports, though you may need to manually recreate your automation workflows and templates in the new platform.
